hero.subtitle: A Sunnah-based Fullday School with Tahfidz Al-Qur'an, Entrepreneurship, and Martial Arts curriculum. Building a foundation of faith and independence from an early age in Bogor City.

keunggulan.title: Why Choose ABAIS?
keunggulan.subtitle: We are committed to producing a generation that memorizes the Qur'an, is independent, and ready to be future leaders

tahfidz.title: Tahfidz Program
tahfidz.desc: A flagship Qur'an memorization program with talaqqi and muraja'ah methods integrated into daily activities.

entrepreneur.title: Entrepreneurship
entrepreneur.desc: Nurturing an entrepreneurial spirit from an early age through programs inspired by Abdurrahman bin Auf (may Allah be pleased with him).

beladiri.title: Martial Arts
beladiri.desc: Martial arts program to build tough, disciplined, and confident character according to the Prophet's (ﷺ) teachings.

sunnah.title: Sunnah-Based
sunnah.desc: All activities are guided by the Qur'an and Sunnah with the understanding of the Salaf.

testimoni.title: What They Say
testimoni.subtitle: The trust of parents and students is our greatest motivation

1.text: Alhamdulillah, my child has memorized 10 juz since attending ABAIS. Besides memorization, their character has also improved. Jazakumullahu khairan.
1.name: Ummu Fatimah

2.text: I am very impressed with the entrepreneurship program at ABAIS. My child has become independent and has an entrepreneurial spirit. MasyaaAllah barakallah.
2.name: Abu Hamzah

3.text: The Islamic school environment and competent teachers make us confident in entrusting our child to ABAIS. Alhamdulillah for everything.
3.name: Ummu Khadijah

hero.title: Student Admissions

alur.title: Registration Process
alur.subtitle: 4 easy steps to register your children

step1.title: 📋 Fill Online Form
step1.desc: Complete the online registration form below or contact admin via WhatsApp.

step2.title: 📄 Prepare Documents
step2.desc: Gather the required documents: birth certificate, family card, report card, photos, and health certificate.

step3.title: 🧪 Selection Test & Interview
step3.desc: Prospective students take a basic skills test and interview with the school.

step4.title: ✅ Announcement & Re-registration
step4.desc: Selection results are announced. Accepted students complete re-registration and payment.
